mapper.select: SELECT /* @SQLID=SUB020301_02-01#Sql005 */ NAME FROM M_CODE WHERE START_DATE <= IFA_DATE_UTIL.IFA_GET_SDATE('YYYYMMDD') AND END_DATE >= IFA_DATE_UTIL.IFA_GET_SDATE('YYYYMMDD') AND CODE_TYPE = '67' AND CODE_1 = '01' AND CODE_2 = 'MARGIN_SDATE'

SELECT /* @SQLID=SUB020301_02-01#Sql006 */ MIN(C_TARGET_DATE) FROM M_CALENDAR WHERE C_CALENDAR_ID = 'T003' AND C_ISO_COUNTRY_CODE = 'JP' AND C_TARGET_DATE >= IFA_DATE_UTIL.IFA_GET_SDATE('YYYYMMDD') AND C_BUS_NONBUS_DIV = '2' AND C_DELETE_FLG = '0'
